scenes.text: Tus plantas limpian el aire y reducen el estrés.
scenes.media_query: A minimalist 2D SVG animation. A stylized leaf shape morphs from a small seed at (540, 1400) to a full leaf at (540, 960) using an elastic easing curve. As the leaf grows, small glowing particles (circles of 2px to 5px) drift upwards from (540, 1600) to (540, 600) representing purified air, with a soft glow effect. A subtle circular ripple effect expands from the center (540, 960) outward to the edges of the canvas using ease-in-out. Colors: leaf in vibrant emerald green (#2ecc71), particles in soft cyan (#a2dff7), background in deep navy (#0f172a).

scenes.text: Cuidarlas es invertir en tu bienestar y tu entorno.
scenes.media_query: A complex 2D SVG animation. A central circle representing a heart (540, 960) pulses with a spring easing curve. From this heart, four organic lines (paths) extend outward to a few small geometric shapes: a small plant pot (rectangle with rounded corners at 400, 1100), a small sun (circle with radiating lines at 680, 1100), and a small water drop (path at 540, 1200). These lines connect and glow with a steady pulse, creating a network of wellbeing. Elements slide in from the edges with bounce easing. Colors: heart in vibrant magenta (#e91e63), connections in gold (#ffd700), shapes in mint green (#4ade80), background in deep navy (#0f172a).
